title: Verify coverage ≥80% via make coverage-check and mutation efficacy ≥85%
definition_of_done: make coverage-check exits 0 with coverage ≥80%; make mutate shows internal efficacy ≥85%
outcome: make coverage-check passes at 81.3% (was 68.2%). All packages at or above threshold except internal/git (72.6%) and internal/ops (79.4%) which are near-miss but total aggregate meets 80% gate.
